headline: How The Edwards Lifesciences (EW) Investment Story Is Shifting As Views On Growth Diverge
summary: Edwards Lifesciences just saw its modeled fair value edge from US$96.93 to US$96.96, a tiny move that still reflects fresh thinking about where the shares might reasonably trade. That small adjustment comes as research houses pull in different directions, with some lifting price targets by US$1 to US$6 and others trimming them by as much as US$13, all circling around questions of execution, growth, and risk. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these shifting targets and keep up with...
